allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['method'], r['uri'], '|', r.get\('middleware', []\)\) for r in data if 'login' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'register' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'sanctum' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'user' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'onboarding' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'logout' in r['uri'].lower\(\) or 'two-factor' in r['uri'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 552 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-Process -Id 552 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 22808 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; netstat -ano | Select-String ':8000|:5173|:5174'")
